data.title: Search over extracted artifacts (not just conversations)
data.description:
## Parent: #1

## Depends on: #3

## Summary

Currently search only finds conversation exchanges. Once we have extracted decisions, learnings, and patterns, search should index and return those too.

## Current Search

```
query → vector search over conversation exchanges → raw snippets
```

## Target Search

```
query → vector search over exchanges + extracted artifacts → rich results
  - conversation matches (existing)
  - decision matches (new)
  - learning matches (new)
  - pattern matches (new)
```

## Implementation

* Embed extracted artifact text into the same vector DB (or a separate table)
* Search results include artifact type in metadata
* Filter by type: `claude-memory search "queue pattern" --type decisions`
* MCP server returns typed results so Claude can distinguish

## Benefits

* Decisions become directly searchable ("what did we decide about X?")
* Patterns surface when relevant ("how did we handle Y before?")
* Learnings prevent repeating mistakes ("what went wrong with Z?")
